ddl.value:
"log_type" <> 'duration'
        OR (
          "reps" IS NULL
          AND "duration_seconds" IS NOT NULL
          AND "distance_meters" IS NULL
        )
ddl.name: workout_sets_log_type_duration_shape

ddl.value:
"log_type" <> 'duration_distance'
        OR (
          "reps" IS NULL
          AND "duration_seconds" IS NOT NULL
          AND "distance_meters" IS NOT NULL
        )
ddl.name: workout_sets_log_type_duration_distance_shape

ddl.value:
"log_type" <> 'duration_reps'
        OR (
          "reps" IS NOT NULL
          AND "duration_seconds" IS NOT NULL
          AND "distance_meters" IS NULL
        )
ddl.name: workout_sets_log_type_duration_reps_shape

ddl.value:
"log_type" <> 'reps'
        OR (
          "reps" IS NOT NULL
          AND "duration_seconds" IS NULL
          AND "distance_meters" IS NULL
        )
ddl.name: workout_sets_log_type_reps_shape

ddl.value: "resistance_type" IS NOT NULL OR "resistance" IS NULL
ddl.name: workout_sets_resistance_type_null_resistance_null

ddl.value: "resistance_type" IS NULL OR "resistance" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: workout_sets_resistance_type_non_null_resistance_non_null
